pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh TIDDLER_TITLE definition
task.json description and verifier.py tags check
Sum of all 'cost' fields in tiddlers generated by setup_task.sh (1200 + 800 + 400 + 80 + 30 + 50 = 2560)
'Flight to Tokyo.tid' generated in setup_task.sh has cost 1200
'Shinjuku Hotel.tid' generated in setup_task.sh has cost 800
'JR Pass.tid' generated in setup_task.sh has cost 400
Sum of 'cost' fields for Activity tiddlers ('Robot Restaurant.tid' = 80, 'TeamLab Planets.tid' = 30) generated in setup_task.sh
'Surprise Expense.tid' generated in export_result.sh has cost 5000
Initial activity total (110) + injected activity cost (5000) = 5110

privileged_info_summary: The Japan Trip itinerary tiddlers are synthetically generated and injected directly via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh. The initial budget totals correctly sum to 2560, comprising 1200 for Flight, 800 for Accommodation, 400 for Transport, 110 for Activity (80 + 30), and 50 for Food. A surprise expense of 5000 under the Activity category is dynamically injected by the evaluation script, which correctly updates the final Activity subtotal to 5110 and the final Total to 7560. The task requires creating a dashboard with the exact title 'Japan Trip Budget Summary' and the tag 'Dashboard'.
